goals.claude_brain_completion: Phase 1 Claude Brain implementation COMPLETED - all core components built: PromptOptimizer, MetaPromptGenerator, CritiqueAnalyzer, FailureHandler, CacheManager, ClaudeBrainManager, and FastAPI service integration

generic_coding_agent.description: Intelligent code repair system using LLM-powered transformations with MCP ecosystem integration
generic_coding_agent.mcp_integration: Serena v2, Dope-Context, ConPort, CLI tools

agent_approach.summary: Selected hybrid genetic-iterative approach for optimal cost-benefit ratio
agent_approach.rationale: Genetic algorithms provide value for complex cases but are 10-50x more expensive; hybrid approach gives 80% benefits with 20% complexity
agent_approach.implementation_details: Enhanced iterative agent with selective genetic operators, bounded attempts, multi-objective fitness
